Matches Finlay et al. 2006 Table 6.1 (same Kaas/Krubitzer mapping source). In _keys/species_reference.csv.
Stated verbatim in Changizi 2001 text ("the tenrec (Echinops telfairi)"); matches Finlay 2006. In _keys/species_reference.csv.
Monotreme cortical map is the short-beaked echidna (Krubitzer Manger Pettigrew & Calford 1995). NOT yet in _keys/species_reference.csv (table is not in a merge).
Matches Finlay 2006 ("North American Opossum"). In _keys/species_reference.csv. NB mapping studies sometimes used Didelphis virginiana; kept marsupialis for repo consistency.
Matches Finlay 2006 ("Northern Quoll"). Northern quoll is the mapped species.
Changizi cites Krubitzer (1995) whose squirrel is Sciurus carolinensis. In _keys/species_reference.csv. Finlay 2006 left this as "Squirrel sp.".
